en: So, you want to come up for a few minutes?
I'm sorry, Jerry. I just don't think this is going to work. Really? I thought...
ko: 미안해, 제리. 이건 잘 안 될 것 같아. 정말? 나는...

en: Gee, I just didn't expect it from the way you've been acting.
ko: 아, 네가 그렇게 행동할 줄은 몰랐어.

en: Are you sure you want to talk about this? Because I sure don't.
ko: 이 얘기를 하고 싶어? 나는 정말 원하지 않는데.

en: Of course I want to talk about it.
Okay. I guess things change for me on Tuesday night. Tuesday night?
ko: 알겠어. 화요일 밤에 내게 변화가 생긴 것 같아. 화요일 밤?

en: My act? What does that have to do with anything?
Well, to be honest, it just didn't make it for me.
It was just so much fluff. I can't believe this.
ko: 너무 허황된 내용이었어. 믿을 수가 없어.

en: So, what are you saying? You didn't like my act? So, that's it?
ko: 그러니까, 네 말은 내 공연이 마음에 들지 않았다는 거야? 그게 전부야?

en: I can't be with someone if I don't respect what they do.
ko: 내가 존경하지 않는 사람과는 함께할 수 없어.
